rawReflection:
small state model: seen-busy, last-busy timestamp, bootstrap timeout,
  and immediate menu detection. Then I’ll update the tests to cover the transition cases instead of the current ad hoc checks.

• I’ve got the current shape. I’m collapsing the idle logic into a few small helper methods so the rules are explicit: immediate
  menu, observed busy-to-idle transition, and bootstrap fallback if the animator started while already idle.

• The first patch missed the exact insertion points. I’m applying it in smaller chunks now, keeping the refactor narrow to the
  codex watchdog file.

• The refactor is in. I’m updating the tests to match the cleaner model: one test for busy-to-idle transition, one for bootstrap
  timeout, plus the explicit approval-menu case.

  - immediate trigger for visible choice/approval menus
  - strong trigger when the worker was observed busy and then becomes not busy

  I updated packages/wrapped-agents/codex-session/src/watchdog.test.ts to cover:

  - visible command approval menu detection
  - immediate escalation for that menu

  If you want, I can commit just this idle-detection cleanup next.
